策略想法
候選想法不是買賣建議。
等 paper gate、風控與資料品質都通過。

qaNotes: Local visual QA uses a non-secret session marker; API correctly returns blocked/unauthenticated, so source panels show blocked instead of fake live.
Verified Traditional Chinese render, no mojibake markers, no token/email leak, and no horizontal overflow at 1365px and 390px.
Production logged-in data health still needs Bruce/user-session smoke; this PR does not store or print credentials.
